nav.overviewDesc: Static overview, next raid, and pending applications
nav.scheduleDesc: Upcoming sessions, availability, and Discord sync
nav.rosterDesc: Member list, roles, and join requests
nav.goalsAndFarmsDesc: Farm goals, mount drops, and clear tracking
nav.gearAndSyncDesc: BiS sets, gear sync, and loot history
nav.dalamudPluginDesc: Sync gear and character data from FFXIV

tips.shortcuts: Press Shift+? to see all keyboard shortcuts
tips.statics: Press Shift+S to return to My Statics
tips.staticNav: Press Ctrl+[ or Ctrl+] to switch statics
tips.tierNav: Press Alt+[ or Alt+] to switch tiers
tips.addPlayer: Press Alt+Shift+P to add a new player
tips.copyLink: Shift+Click a player card to copy link
tips.groupView: Press G to toggle G1/G2 view
tips.logLoot: Press Alt+L to log a loot drop
tips.floorCleared: Press Alt+B to mark floor cleared
tips.lootSubtabs: Press Alt+1-3 to switch sub tabs
tips.goPlayer: Alt+Click entry to jump to player
tips.gridToggle: Press G to toggle grid/list view
tips.weekNav: Press Alt+← or Alt+→ to change week
tips.newTier: Press Alt+Shift+N to create a new tier

groupView.scheduleSubtitle: Plan sessions and manage recurring events.
groupView.goalsSubtitle: Track objectives, farms, and weekly goals.

goalsPage.staticObjectivesDesc: Official static goals are used for matching, discovery, applications, and roster alignment.
goalsPage.title: Title
goalsPage.noObjectivesManageDesc: Add a static goal to enable matching for applicants and discovery.
goalsPage.noObjectivesMemberDesc: No official goals have been set for this static yet.
goalsPage.removeObjectiveMessage: Remove this objective? This cannot be undone.

auth.anonymousActivityHint: When on, your name is hidden in the static activity feed

home.heroTagline: Gear tracking & loot planning for your static
home.featureGearTrackingDesc: Track BiS progress for your entire static. See who needs what at a glance.
home.featureLootPriorityDesc: Smart loot suggestions based on need, role priority, and past distributions.
home.featureTeamSummaryDesc: See total materials needed, books required, and estimated weeks to BiS.
home.featureMultiTierDesc: Keep your roster across raid tiers. Roll over from M1S–M4S to M5S–M8S without losing your setup.
home.docsQuickStartDesc: Get your static set up in 5 minutes

discover.pageSubheading: Browse public recruitment listings and find a group that fits your schedule, role, and vibe.
discover.allListingsOptIn: All listings are opt-in. Only public details chosen by the static lead are shown.
discover.emptyDescFiltered: No matches for those filters. Try relaxing role, day, or data center filters.
discover.emptyDescDefault: No statics are recruiting here yet. Static leads can list their group from Settings → Listing.
discover.noDetails: No details yet. Open the listing to learn more.

banner.loginPrompt: Interested in joining this static? Log in to send a request.
banner.cta: Looking for a static? Send a request to join.

modal.requestSent: Request sent! The static lead will review your application.
modal.linkCharacterFirstDesc: Set up your Player Hub profile with a linked character before applying.
modal.setMainJobFirstDesc: Add at least one job profile in your Player Hub before applying.
modal.profilePrivateSnapshotOnly: Profile is private; leads will see only this application snapshot
modal.alsoAvailableDesc: Toggle jobs to include in your application
modal.roleMatchesNeededRole: Your {{role}} role matches a needed role
modal.noDirectMatch: No specific role/job match, but you can still apply
modal.discordHandleDesc: So the lead can reach you. Removed after they respond.
modal.discordHandlePrivacy: Your handle is only visible while the request is pending and is automatically deleted once accepted, declined, or cancelled.
modal.availabilityDesc: Days/times you can raid, timezone, flexibility.
modal.includeAvailabilitySummaryDesc: Shares timezone and configured day labels from Player Hub, not exact time windows.
modal.includeExactAvailability: Include exact available windows for this application
modal.includeExactAvailabilityDesc: Optional. Exact windows are stored only in this application snapshot and are not shown on your public profile.
modal.availabilityPlaceholder: e.g. Tue/Thu 8-11pm EST, flexible on weekends
modal.messageDesc: Introduce yourself, your experience, goals, and why you want to join.
modal.messagePlaceholder: Tell the lead about yourself and why you'd be a good fit...
modal.previewLeadWillSee: This is what the static lead will see. Later Player Hub changes will not rewrite this.
modal.fullProfileVisible: The static lead will be able to view your full Player Hub profile.
modal.snapshotOnlyVisible: The static lead will see only this application snapshot.
modal.publicGoalsOnly: Aligned/conflict counts from your public goals only.
modal.publicBisOnly: Name of your active public BiS target for this job, or Private if not set.
modal.privateGoalsNeverShared: Private goals and private BiS targets are never shared.

review.readinessInProgress: Still preparing — gear may be incomplete
review.readinessNotReady: Not yet ready for this role
review.readinessUnknown: Applicant has not self-assessed readiness yet
review.addedAsMember: They have been added as a member of {{staticName}}.
review.addToRosterToComplete: Add them to the roster to complete onboarding.
review.publicGoalsOnly: Counts from public goals only — goal text is not shared.

invite.notFoundDesc: This invitation may have expired or been revoked.
invite.heading: You're Invited!
invite.subheading: You've been invited to join a static
invite.roleLeadDesc: Can edit roster and manage members
invite.roleMemberDesc: Can edit their own character gear
invite.invalidWarning: This invitation is no longer valid. It may have expired or reached its usage limit.
invite.alreadyMember: You're already a member of this static.
invite.loginPrompt: Please log in with Discord to accept this invitation.

header.inviteMembersInactive: Click to create an invitation link

context.playerHubTooltip: Player Hub — character, jobs, gear & applications

overview.syncGearForApplications: Sync gear so applications and recommendations can use your current item level.
overview.noJobsAdded: Add your main and flex jobs so statics can see where you fit.
overview.trackRewardProgress: Track reward progress so static farms can line up later.
overview.trackGearingClears: Track gearing, clears, raid prep, or reminders.
overview.collectionProgressDetected: Collection progress detected from your latest sync
overview.readyForStaticFinder: Your profile is ready for Static Finder.
overview.compactPreview: Compact preview from your Player Hub setup
overview.staticFinderRequestJoin: Static Finder and Request to Join

availability.title: Availability
availability.setUsualRaidTimes: Set your usual raid times once. When used in a static, it copies into that static's week so you can adjust exceptions there.
availability.setOnceReuse: Set your usual availability once, then reuse it across statics.
availability.quickFillPlanning: Used by schedule quick fill when planning this week.
availability.fillsEmptyThisWeek: Fills empty This Week days only.
availability.notShownOnPublicProfile: Not shown on public profile yet.
availability.editorDesc: These hours stay private to you and can be reused when filling static schedules.
availability.instructions: Click or drag to select your usual availability. Use presets to keep the grid focused while your saved slots stay intact.

sidebar.overviewDesc: Character overview, goals, and quick actions
sidebar.syncDesc: Plugin sync status and character gear snapshots
sidebar.jobsGearDesc: Job profiles, BiS targets, and readiness status
sidebar.collectionsDesc: Mounts, music, weapons, collection goals, and tasks
sidebar.availabilityDesc: Your weekly availability for raid nights
sidebar.previewDesc: Preview and manage your shareable profile
sidebar.pluginSyncDesc: Open Sync & Gear to manage the Dalamud plugin

collectionsTabs.goalsDesc: Personal tasks for gearing, clears, raid prep, or reminders. These are separate from collection rewards.
collectionsTabs.prioritiesDesc: Mounts, music, weapons, and other rewards you're hunting or farming. Adjust visibility to share them with your statics.
collectionsTabs.browseDesc: Browse the full rewards catalog to discover what's available and set your intent on new items.

preview.shareLinkRegenerated: Share link regenerated — old links no longer work
preview.profileSharingDesc: Choose who can view your profile. Private notes and goals are never shown.
preview.privateWarningPrefix: Your share link exists, but your profile is still
preview.applicationPreviewDesc: This is what static leads see when reviewing your application.
preview.completeSetupToPreview: Complete your character and job setup to see a preview of your application profile.
preview.whatLeadSees: What a static lead sees when you apply
preview.noGearSavedForJob: No gear saved for this job
preview.snapshotDisclaimer: Applications keep a copy of your profile at the time you apply. Later changes will not rewrite submitted applications.
preview.privateNotesNeverIncluded: Private notes and goals are never included.

jobsGear.applicationReadinessDesc: Complete these items so your profile is ready when you apply to a static.
jobsGear.linkCharacterDesc: Jobs & Gear starts from a connected character, then tracks each job loadout separately.
jobsGear.headerDesc: Choose which jobs you want to share, and keep their gear ready for applications.
jobsGear.needsReviewTooltip: Gear is saved but the job is still marked as not ready. Update readiness when the job meets your target.
jobsGear.trackedJobsDesc: Static leads see the job and gear you choose when you apply.
jobsGear.noJobProfilesDesc: Add a main job, then add alt or flex jobs you might use for other statics.
jobsGear.applicationGearDesc: Static leads see the job and gear you choose when you apply. Later gear changes will not rewrite old applications.
jobsGear.noGearSavedForJobYet: No gear saved for this job yet.
jobsGear.notesPlaceholder: e.g., Missing weapon, BiS except ring2

characterCard.fallbackDesc: Lodestone can only refresh the currently equipped job. Choose a job only if the current job could not be detected.
characterCard.unlinkMessage: Remove {{name}} from your profile? Saved gear for this character will also be deleted.

syncCenter.headerDesc: Use the plugin to keep jobs and gear updated automatically. Gear can also be entered manually in Jobs & Gear.
syncCenter.linkCharacterFirst: Link a character before checking gear status.
syncCenter.noCharacterLinked: No character linked — sync requires a linked character
syncCenter.setupAutoSyncDesc: Install the XIVRaidPlannerPlugin to sync your saved gearsets into Jobs & Gear. Each sync reads all gearsets saved in-game and uploads them in one batch.
syncCenter.syncSourcesDesc: Gear data is resolved in priority order — Plugin overrides Lodestone, Lodestone overrides manual entry.
syncCenter.lodestoneFallbackDesc: When plugin data is missing or stale, gear from your public Lodestone profile is used automatically. Make sure your character page is set to public for fallback to work.
syncCenter.coverageReadiness: Readiness is managed in Jobs & Gear.
syncCenter.applicationSnapshotNote: When you apply to a static, the request captures your selected job and gear at that moment. Later profile changes will not rewrite old applications.
syncCenter.privacyDesc: Plugin sync activity appears in your static's overview feed as "A member synced" — your name is not shown to other members. Aggregate updates use a system label with no actor name.

goals.title: Tasks & Goals
goals.desc: Track gearing, clears, raid prep, reminders, or custom tasks.
goals.noTasksDesc: Add a task to track gearing, clears, or raid prep goals.

collectionsCenter.visibilityStaticDesc: Visible to your statics. Feeds into Suggested Farms.
collectionsCenter.visibilityPublicDesc: Visible on your public dossier and to statics via Suggested Farms.
collectionsCenter.sharePrompt: Share with statics so your team sees this in Suggested Farms?
collectionsCenter.nothingTrackedDesc: Browse the catalog and mark rewards as Wanted or Farming.

group.doesNotExist: The static group you're looking for doesn't exist.
group.privateStaticDesc: This static is private. Please log in to view it.

overview.noSessionsDesc: Add a session so your team can RSVP
overview.rosterNotConfiguredDesc: Sync gear or assign roster jobs to start tracking readiness.
overview.noFarmDesc: Track member progress in Mount Farms to get ranked suggestions.
overview.noObjectives: No objectives set. Add one to enable matching.
overview.noGoalsDesc: Track mounts, tokens, and rewards your group wants to farm.
overview.noSuggestions: No suggestions yet. Propose content for your static.
overview.noActivityDesc: Track a shared reward to start building activity.
overview.objectiveCommandEmptyDesc: Add one in Goals & Farms to get actionable suggestions here.

roster.clickAllowDragging: Click to allow dragging players to reorder/swap.
roster.cardsCanBeDragged: Cards can be dragged. Click to lock and prevent accidental moves.
roster.subsShownSeparately: On — subs shown in their own section. Click to merge them into the main roster.
roster.subsMerged: Off — subs merged into the main roster. Click to separate them.
roster.createFirstTier: Create your first tier snapshot to start tracking gear progress.
roster.noPlayerHubCharactersAvailable: No Player Hub characters available to link.
roster.allCharactersAlreadyRegistered: All characters are already registered, or this player has no linked characters.
roster.noPlayerHubCharactersFoundAskPlayer: No Player Hub characters found — ask the player to link a character.

schedule.timezoneNote: Times are shown in the static's timezone and automatically converted to your local time ({{tz}}).

availabilityGrid.recommendedRaidNightDesc: {{available}}/{{total}} available based on typical weekly schedule.
availabilityGrid.bestRaidWindowsDesc: {{available}}/{{total}} marked available from the best raid windows panel.
availabilityGrid.setUpPlayerHubAvailabilityFirst: Set up Player Hub availability first.
availabilityGrid.noEmptyTypicalWeekDays: No empty Typical Week days to import - existing static templates were preserved.
availabilityGrid.noPlayerHubDaysMatched: No Player Hub availability days matched this static template.
availabilityGrid.failedToImportPlayerHubAvailability: Failed to import Player Hub availability.
availabilityGrid.typicalWeeklyScheduleEditableDesc: Mark your usual free hours for each day of the week. This stays saved and helps the static find a permanent raid night.
availabilityGrid.typicalWeeklyScheduleViewOnlyDesc: View the static's typical weekly availability. Sign in as a member to add yours.
availabilityGrid.findOverlapWindowsEditableDesc: Drag across the grid to mark when you are free. Your picks stay highlighted while the static heat map shows the best windows.
availabilityGrid.findOverlapWindowsViewOnlyDesc: Browse the static heat map to spot the best raid windows for the next seven days.
availabilityGrid.markedInNextSevenDays: Marked in the next seven days
availabilityGrid.signInToAddYours: Sign in as a static member to add yours
availabilityGrid.membersTrackedDesc: Party members counted for best raid windows
availabilityGrid.sharedWindowsDesc: Slots where at least half the static is available
availabilityGrid.importFromPlayerHubAvailabilityDesc: Use your personal default as this static's Typical Week. Existing static days are preserved.
availabilityGrid.hiddenSlotsShowAll_one: {{count}} slot in hidden hours — show all
availabilityGrid.hiddenSlotsShowAll_other: {{count}} slots in hidden hours — show all
availabilityGrid.primePresetNotice: Showing 6 PM – 2 AM. Slots after midnight are the next calendar day.
availabilityGrid.hoverPopulatedSlot: Hover a populated slot to see who is available there.

schedule.createFirstRaidNight: Create your first raid night and choose whether availability needs to be tracked.
schedule.integrationSecrets: Integration secrets are permission-gated. Webhook URLs and bot tokens are never shown to Members or Viewers. Calendar links are personal tokens that Leads and Owners can regenerate or revoke at any time.
schedule.discordSharedSource: Events and reminders share the same XIVRaidPlanner raid schedule. Native Discord Events mirror upcoming occurrences; reminder messages ping from those same raid times.
schedule.discordWebhookPings: Webhook pings for the same raid occurrences
schedule.discordRecommendedDefaults: Recommended defaults: 24 hrs, 1 hr, and Missing RSVP.
schedule.integrationConnectStartFailed: Failed to start Discord connection. Please try again.
schedule.integrationLinkPending: Not linked yet — run /xrp link <code> in your Discord server first.
schedule.integrationDisconnectFailed: Failed to disconnect. Please try again.
schedule.integrationSyncFailed: Discord sync failed. Check bot token and guild ID.
schedule.postNextSessionToDiscord: Post the next session to Discord
schedule.discordOnlyLeadsOwners: Only Leads and Owners can manage integrations.
schedule.discordFixOneOfTwoWays: Fix in one of two ways:
schedule.discordReinviteBotDesc: use the button below to re-authorize with the correct permissions. Manage Events will be pre-checked.
schedule.discordGrantManuallyDesc: Server Settings → Integrations → XIVRaidPlanner → enable Manage Events
schedule.discordUpcomingOccurrences: Upcoming raid occurrences sync automatically as Discord Events with a 4-week rolling window.
schedule.discordReturnAndClick: Return here and click Check now
schedule.discordConnectBotDesc: Connect the XIVRaidPlanner bot to your Discord server to automatically publish raid sessions as native Guild Events.
schedule.discordSessionsInEventsTab: Sessions appear in your server's Events tab
schedule.discordMembersCanRsvp: Members can RSVP directly in Discord
schedule.discordRequiresPermission: Requires the bot to have Manage Events permission.
schedule.discordNotConfigured: Discord Events bot is not configured on this server. Contact your site admin.
schedule.discordOnlyLeadsOwnersEvents: Only Leads and Owners can manage Discord Guild Events.
schedule.calendarSubscribeVia: Subscribe via Google, Apple, or Outlook
schedule.calendarGenerateFeedLink: Generate a private feed link to subscribe from your calendar app.
schedule.bestRaidWindowsDesc: These are the strongest overlap windows from your static's availability.
schedule.noAvailabilityMarked: No availability marked yet. Ask your static to paint the grid so the planner can find your best raid windows.
schedule.ownersLeadsCanCreateDraft: Owners and leads can turn any highlighted recommendation into a ready-to-edit session draft.
schedule.ownersLeadsCanCreateFromBlocks: Owners and leads can create sessions directly from these recommended blocks.
schedule.quickFillSetUpPlayerHubFirst: Set up Player Hub availability first
schedule.noUpcomingOccurrences: No upcoming occurrences in the next 4 weeks.
schedule.cancelOccurrenceMessage: Cancel the occurrence on {{date}}? Members will no longer see it in the upcoming schedule.
schedule.restoreOccurrenceMessage: Restore the occurrence on {{date}} back to the schedule?
schedule.bestRecurringRaidWindowsDesc: Based on typical weekly schedules, these slots have the most overlap every week.
schedule.noOverlapFoundYet: No overlap found yet. Members need to fill in their typical weekly schedule first.

scheduleUpcoming.noSessionsDesc: Create your first raid night and choose whether availability should be tracked.
scheduleUpcoming.noRecurringSessions: No recurring sessions. Create one in the calendar to set up weekly raid nights.
scheduleUpcoming.discordEmptyDesc: Link Discord to send reminders and sync event announcements automatically.
scheduleUpcoming.pluginSetupDesc: Sync gear and character data from FFXIV automatically with the plugin.
scheduleUpcoming.noRecurringSessionsShort: No recurring sessions. Create one in the calendar view.
scheduleUpcoming.pluginRealtimeDesc: Sync gear & character data from FFXIV in real time.

morePage.requestsDesc: Review and manage join requests from prospective members.
morePage.leadToolsDesc: Manage static details, roles, permissions, and membership settings.
morePage.lootHistoryDesc: Track and review loot entries logged across all raid sessions.
morePage.splitPlannerDesc: Plan loot splits and assign roles for split clears.
morePage.integrationsDesc: Connect Discord and other services to enhance scheduling and reminders.
morePage.pluginDesc: Sync gear scores, jobs, and character data directly from FFXIV with the XIVRaidPlanner plugin.
morePage.settingsDesc: Configure your static details, visibility, and member notifications.
morePage.exportsDesc: Export roster data, loot history, and gear snapshots for backups or external tools.
morePage.activityLogDesc: View important changes and recent activity across your static.
morePage.sessionHistoryDesc: View past sessions, attendance records, and recurring event history.
morePage.irreversibleActionsDesc: These actions cannot be undone. Proceed with caution.

session.title: Session
session.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{title}}"? This will also remove all RSVPs.
session.recurringWhatToDo: This is a recurring session. What would you like to do?

lootLog.listViewDesc: Chronological loot list by floor or timeline.
lootLog.allWeeksDesc: View all loot across every week
lootLog.resetDataDesc: Clear loot, books, or all data
lootLog.logWeekDesc: Log all drops for this week using a step-by-step wizard
lootLog.logMaterialDesc: Record twine, glaze, or solvent. Press
lootLog.noEntriesThisTier: No loot or materials logged this tier.

collections.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{goalTitle}}"? This will remove all participant states and drop history for this goal.
collections.noActiveFarmsDesc: Promote a suggestion to an active farm, or browse the catalog to track something manually.
collections.loggingWill: Logging a drop will automatically set their status to "have" if they currently need or want it.
collections.suggestionsDesc: Suggestions appear when roster members share Hunting or Interested preferences via their Player Hub.
collections.basedOnPreferences: Based on Player Hub preferences shared with this static.
collections.privacyNote: Only preferences shared as "Shared with statics" or "Public on dossier" appear here. Private choices stay private.
collections.catalogUnavailable: Catalog service unavailable — showing built-in curated farms.
collections.catalogEmpty: Catalog returned empty — showing built-in curated farms.

mountFarm.pluginSetup: Use the XIV Raid Planner plugin and run /xrp sync to import supported owned rewards and currency counts automatically.
mountFarm.manualOverridesDesc: Some values were manually corrected and won't be overwritten by plugin sync
mountFarm.pluginUnavailable: Plugin sync unavailable. You can still track manually.
mountFarm.suggestedFarmsIntegration: Toggling "Wanted" here also shares your intent with your statics via "Suggested Farms".
mountFarm.noTrials: No trials match the "{{filterLabel}}" filter for this expansion.
mountFarm.noTrialsAvailable: No trials available for this expansion.
mountFarm.noMemberData: No member data yet. Members can start tracking their progress below.
mountFarm.noTrialsConfigured: No trials configured for this expansion.
mountFarm.noCurrencyExchange: No currency exchange for this trial

settings.title: Settings
settings.onlyLeadsOwners: Only Leads and Owners can manage settings.
settings.apiKeysDesc: API keys allow external tools like the Dalamud plugin to access your data.
settings.apiKeysEmptyHint: Create one to use with external tools
settings.apiKeyOneTimeWarning: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.
settings.apiKeyPermissionsNote: This key will have access to read priority data and write loot/material logs for your statics.
settings.apiKeyRevokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke "{{name}}"? Any applications using this key will lose access immediately.
settings.prioritySubAdvancedDisabledTooltip: Advanced options are not available when priority is disabled
settings.priorityManualPlanningDesc: Manual planning mode lets you pre-assign loot to players for each week. Go to the Priority tab to create weekly assignments.
settings.priorityDisabledDesc: Priority is disabled. All players will show equal priority in the Priority tab. This is useful for groups that prefer equal distribution.
settings.recruitmentReviewApplicants: Review each applicant's job, gear, and availability before accepting.
settings.recruitmentEnablePublicFirst: Enable "Public Static" in General settings first, then configure your listing.
settings.recruitmentTurnOnListing: Turn on your listing to appear in Static Finder and start receiving applications.
settings.noActiveFarmsDesc: Track mount farms, tokens, and other group goals.
settings.promoteSuggestionDesc: Promoting "{{title}}" will create a new static objective goal from this suggestion.
settings.titleOverrideHint: optional — uses suggestion title if blank

listingForm.statusClosedDesc: Hidden from Static Finder search results
listingForm.jobSelectHint: Select specific jobs, or leave blank to accept any {{role}}.
listingForm.enableListingHint: Enable listing to appear in Static Finder.
listingForm.promptMidcoreSavageText: Midcore savage static. Consistent prog with no drama.
listingForm.promptBlindProgText: Blind prog friendly — we figure out mechanics together.
listingForm.promptReclearFocusedText: Reclear-focused static. BiS farming and smooth clears.
listingForm.promptAltJobFriendlyText: Alt job friendly — bring what works for the team.
listingForm.suggestNoFields: All fields already have values, or no suggestions available
listingForm.saveSuccessLive: Saved! Your listing is live in Static Finder.
listingForm.saveSuccessPendingPublic: Saved! It will go live once Public Static is enabled.
listingForm.privateStaticWarning: Static is private — enable Public Static in the General tab for this listing to go live.
listingForm.toggleListInFinderHint: Players can discover your static when browsing for groups
listingForm.toggleShowMemberCountHint: Optional — lets applicants see how full your group is
listingForm.aboutPublicNotice: Description and contact info are public. Do not include anything private.
listingForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell recruits about your static — goals, vibe, loot rules, raid history.
listingForm.recruitingHint: Select role groups to recruit. Expand a role to choose specific jobs or adjust priority.
listingForm.discordRequiredHint: Members must be in a Discord server
listingForm.contactPublicNotice: Contact info is public on Static Finder. Do not post anything you want to keep private.

errors.invalidRequest: Invalid request. Please check your input.
errors.noPermission: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.notFound: The requested item was not found.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.timeoutError: Request timed out. Please try again.

wizard.discardChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes in the wizard. Are you sure you want to discard them?
wizard.staticNameHelper: Choose a name that your team will recognize
wizard.raidTierHelper: Select which raid tier this static will progress through
wizard.makePublicDescription: Public statics can be discovered by anyone with the share link
wizard.splitClearDescription: Adds manual main/alt Run A and Run B planning to this static's Roster.
wizard.nextStepText: You'll set up your roster with player names and jobs.
wizard.staticReadyMessage: Share the invite link below with your team members so they can join.
wizard.inviteLinkMemberNote: Members who use this link will join with the Member role.
wizard.confirmCopyTitle: Have you copied the invite link?
wizard.confirmCopyMessage: Make sure you've copied the invite link before leaving this page.
wizard.confirmCopyFindAgain: You can find this link again anytime:
wizard.emptySlotNote: Empty slots will be created as placeholders. You can configure them later.
wizard.readyToCreateNote: Click "Create Static" below to finish. You'll be the owner with full control.
